rulings.Case Title: FRANCISCO MELVIN QUIRARTE AS TRUSTEE OF THE VS. CENTRAL GARDENS, INC. et al

rulings.Case Title: MARY RUTH LADD VS. PLANKTOS INC A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer To San Mateo County And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 15, 2008 LINE 10. DEFENDANTS PLANKTOS, INC., D2FUSION, INC., SOLAR ENERGY, LTD. AND NELSON SKALBANIA'S Motion To Transfer To San Mateo County And For Sanctions: HEARING REQUIRED TO DETERMINE IF PLAINTIFF SIGNED THE DECLARATIONS. IF THE DECLARATION IS SIGNED, IT IS ADMITTED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS NUMBERED 1, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9, 11, 12, 14, 15, 18 AND 19 ARE OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS NUMBERED 3, 10, 13 AND 16 ARE SUSTAINED. NUMBERS 6 AND 17, THE FIRST SENTENCE IS OVERRULED, THE SECOND SENTENCE IS SUSTAINED. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: JUDY DOUGLASS VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA (CAL TRANS) et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 15, 2008 LINE 3. DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S (CAL TRANS) DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION BY PLAINTIFF. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: CASSANDRA C GRAPSA-APOSTOLIDOU VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, A et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 15, 2008 LINE 6. DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, (AMENDED) DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: THE DEMURRER TO THE SIXTH AND ELEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED BECAUSE THE COURT MAY NOT TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE REQUESTED RECORDS. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ALLEGED A LACK OF CONSENT; SUSTAINED AS TO EIGHTH AND NINTH CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FAILURE TO ALLEGE SPECIFIC FACTS TO SUPPORT THE CLAIM; SUSTAINED AS TO TENTH CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON SHOEMAKER V FRIEDBERG (1947) 80 CAL APP 2D 911, 915-916; OVERRULED AS TO TWELFTH CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 1685 FOR ALLEGED GROSS NEGLIGENCE AND SUSTAINED AS TO THIRTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR LACK OF FACTS TO SUPPORT A CLAIM, TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: CASSANDRA C GRAPSA-APOSTOLIDOU VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, A et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 15, 2008 LINE 5. DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR, DUPLICATE ENTRY. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: CASSANDRA C GRAPSA-APOSTOLIDOU VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, A et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 15, 2008 LINE 6. DEFENDANTS REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, LINDA CENTORE, DENLY HERBERT, NELSON ARTIGA, PERLINE AKHAVAN AND ANASTASIOS KARYDIS' DEMURRER: THE DEMURRER TO THE SIXTH AND ELEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED BECAUSE THE COURT MAY NOT TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE REQUESTED RECORDS. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ALLEGED A LACK OF CONSENT; SUSTAINED AS TO EIGHTH AND NINTH CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FAILURE TO ALLEGE SPECIFIC FACTS TO SUPPORT THE CLAIM; SUSTAINED AS TO TENTH CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON SHOEMAKER V FRIEDBERG (1947) 80 CAL APP 2D 911, 915-916; OVERRULED AS TO TWELFTH CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 1685 FOR ALLEGED GROSS NEGLIGENCE AND SUSTAINED AS TO THIRTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR LACK OF FACTS TO SUPPORT A CLAIM, TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. =(302/PJM/VC)
